summary: Iteration 2 testing — added 13 new backend tests covering upload/files, financing, similar, testimonials CRUD, extended settings, and property geo/featured_photo. All 43 backend tests pass (30 regression + 13 new). Frontend verified end-to-end: logo in navbar, written phone (14) 99113-6895 in navbar & footer, new menu 'Simulação' + 'Sobre Larissa', /sobre page with missão/visão/valores/photo/testimonials/socials, /financiamento with live SAC simulator and successful submission that creates a funnel lead (origem=site, stage=novo, temperatura=quente), /imoveis with Leaflet map + 12 markers + 12 listing cards side-by-side, detail page with carousel/similar/approximate-location map/WhatsApp CTA and NO 'Tenho interesse' form, admin sidebar shows Depoimentos between Imóveis and Relatórios, /admin/depoimentos lists seeded testimonials with Add button, /admin/configuracoes exposes Identidade/Logo/Foto/Missão/Visão/Valores/YouTube/TikTok/LinkedIn/Google/Taxa de juros sections, /admin/imoveis form has file input + upload trigger.

issues: React hydration warning in dev: <span> cannot be a child of <option> (caused by Emergent IDE dynamic-decorator wrapper around option text in Financing.jsx line 157). Functional but logs a console error; worth cleaning the dynamic wrapping if possible.

action_items: (Optional) Investigate Financing.jsx <option> hydration warning — Emergent decorator inserts <span> inside <option>. Non-blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1100 lines — consider splitting routers (public/admin/uploads/settings) into modules for maintainability.
admin_create_testimonial / admin_update_testimonial use `data: dict` instead of a Pydantic model; input isn't validated. Add TestimonialIn model with rating bounds (1–5).
/api/files/{path} serves all uploaded files publicly via DB record; once we add private uploads (contracts, docs) this will need ACL (visibility flag) — currently fine for photos only.
POST /api/public/financing does not rate-limit; could be abused to spam leads. Consider basic per-IP throttle or captcha on form.
Testimonial delete returns 200 even when nothing was deleted (deleted=0). Return 404 for unknown id for clearer contract.
seed_data_creation: Tests created transient data with TEST_ prefix (property, testimonial, leads) and cleaned up where feasible. Financing test leaves one funnel lead named 'TEST_Financing_Pytest' visible in /admin/leads (by design, to verify creation).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features working. Backend pytest regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py covers: extended settings, geo fields, similar properties, financing public endpoint + funnel-lead side-effect, upload auth + serve + format validation + 404, testimonials CRUD auth + persistence, admin settings extended fields, admin property auto-geocode + featured_photo persistence. Storage integration is real (Emergent objstore) and working; the upload test uses PIL to create a 300x200 JPEG in-memory. Frontend selectors: financing form uses data-testid (fin-nome/fin-telefone/fin-renda/fin-parcela/fin-valor-imovel/fin-prazo/fin-submit), not name attributes.
